# CarGPS.kz — GPS Fleet Tracking in Kazakhstan

## About
CarGPS.kz provides 4G GPS tracker installation and fleet monitoring services across Kazakhstan. We serve individuals, businesses, and fleet operators with real-time vehicle tracking, fuel monitoring, geofencing, and WhatsApp/Telegram notifications.

## Key Facts
- Company: CarGPS.kz
- Country: Kazakhstan
- Languages: Russian, Kazakh
- Phone: +7 778 258 9661
- Email: info@cargps.kz
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/77782589661
- GPS Platform: https://gps.cargps.kz
- Online Store: https://shop.cargps.kz

## Products & Pricing
- GS900 4G GPS Tracker: 15,000 KZT (one-time purchase, no rental)
- Monthly monitoring subscription: 2,000 KZT/month
- Includes: monitoring platform, mobile app, WhatsApp/Telegram alerts, reports, geofences

## Services
- GPS tracker installation (30 minutes)
- Fleet monitoring (real-time tracking, route history, speed control)
- Fuel monitoring and theft detection
- Geofencing with instant alerts
- Monthly reports and analytics

## Coverage
- All regions of Kazakhstan
- 4G network coverage
- Accuracy: up to 2 meters

## FAQ
Q: How much does a GPS tracker cost in Kazakhstan?
A: The GS900 4G GPS tracker costs 15,000 KZT as a one-time purchase. Monthly monitoring is 2,000 KZT/month.

Q: How long does GPS tracker installation take?
A: Installation takes approximately 30 minutes.

Q: What notifications do I get?
A: You receive real-time alerts via WhatsApp and Telegram for geofence entry/exit, speed violations, and other events.

Q: Does it work across all of Kazakhstan?
A: Yes, the 4G tracker works across all regions of Kazakhstan with cellular coverage.

Q: Can I monitor fuel consumption?
A: Yes, the system tracks fuel levels and can detect fuel theft or unauthorized refueling.

Q: Is there a mobile app?
A: Yes, you can monitor your vehicles from any device — phone, tablet, or computer.

- Main (Russian): https://cargps.kz/
- Russian: https://cargps.kz/ru.html
- Kazakh: https://cargps.kz/kk.html
